executive_summary: Autonomous red team demo: recon → exploit → post-exploit against Metasploitable 2 in an isolated Docker lab.
attack_narrative: Attacker scans target ports, identifies a backdoored FTP service, exploits it for shell access, then harvests credentials.

kill_chain.description: Targeted port scan and service fingerprinting.
Exploit vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor for remote shell.
Harvest system info and credential files.

success_criteria: Shell access obtained via exploited service
